entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori (APP Server)のvCPU数増強について
entry.content: RISE の Private edition のお客様には、 SAPから CDM: Client Delivery Manager の担当者がアサインされているので CDM にコンタクトしてみるといいです。

entry.title: Pay Slips Templates Australia
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

I'm working a new project, and the company would like to change the Pay Slip.

Does anyone have a different SAP Template Pay Slip, so I can show it to my client?

Thank you very much in advance for your help.

Fatima

entry.title: Info Record issue
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

The info record for the material is created for 2000 USD for example and later the vendor gave a new price like 3000 USD is there any way that this new price of 3000 USD will automatically update in the info record when we do MIGO? Please advise.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Extensibility - Types of Extensibilities
entry.content: @filipebst  - A good blog covers the whole extensibility concept at a high level.

entry.title: Re: How to execute a native sql query from abap program o...
entry.content: you have to embed your HANA Calculation view into an ABAP CDS view that you will be able to consume from ABAP programs. You can refer to the following blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-consume-hana-calculation-views-in-s-4hana-cds-views/ba-p/13476798

entry.title: Re: How to create custom OData service in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, you can create your own Odata service or a rest endpoint using the RAP framework in the 3SL system.

You should have a user in your development system with tenant 080, assign the tenant a developer role, and then connect the tenant with your ADT.

There, you can develop the full-fledged implementation of your choice based on the RAP framework, the only recommended cloud framework.

Please let me know if you need more info.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Looping Process Call
entry.content:
Hi DenizZilyas,

 

what if we still have more records to fetch but loop max iteration value reached? In such scenario How to fetch missing records?

entry.title: Re: Full update of 0CO_OM_WBS_3 does not work. I get only...
entry.content:
Hi, 

If note 2880477 - Compat-Views/Timestamp: Leap Days not Correct cannot solve the issue, it's recommended to open a SAP case under BW-BCT-CO-OM for further help. Please also provide the recent missing document numbers and the remote connection in the case.

Regards,
Maggie

entry.title: How to Cancel test tenant creation service request and impact of cancellation
entry.content:
a request was created a day ago and its status is showing that "Downtime Passed". see attachment. downtime date 09-April-2024 was mentioned in service request then whay it it showing downtime passed.

secondly, how to cancel the test tenant request. but before cancellation need to know the impact.

entry.title: Inquiry About Free Trials for SAP ERP Integration with Boomi

Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently exploring integration options for SAP ERP with Boomi and was wondering if there are any free trials available for SAP ERP that can be used to connect with Boomi. I would appreciate any information or guidance you can provide on this matter.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 WEB-CLIENT - Cannot find a column is UDF in Op...
entry.content:
I've found the reason for this issue, maybe it's from the UDF definition when the character quantity was over permission. I'd tried to create a new UDF with type Alpha-254length, then I checked at Web-client and it showed.

Hopefully helpful to all of you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - What’s New 2405
entry.content:
Hello

Please so the C_SEN2305 Certification will be updated to C_SEN2405 right ?

entry.title: Re: 404 Error in Learning Journeys
entry.content: All the Learning Journeys are functioning once more. Many thanks for the assistance, @Margit_Wagner!

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Kolkata SAP Community Group!!!
entry.content: Hi I a new here, how can I get the SAP community ID referred to here ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - What’s New 2405
entry.content:
The name of the certification may be updated but the questions in the certifcation will likely not change immediately.  The certification consists of 100's of questions about SAP Enable Now and SAP Companion functionality and every person who does the certification gets a sample of those questions.  At the moment, none of those questions are likely to relate to changes associated with the 2406 release and even once the 2406 release is available, it may result in a small number of new questions. 

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - What’s New 2405
entry.content:
Thank you so much for your clarification !

From what I understand the code of the certification will change to C_SEN2406 but the questions will remain the same, right ?

entry.title: Re: How to create custom OData service in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
@ranjeetkumar07 Thank you for your reply.

I did the same and uploaded in sap public cloud.

The Same Odata when we try using it for making report with the URL of Odata, it works fine.
But when we are trying to make a Form Template or anything else where a Data Source is use, we are not being able to see the Custom Odata/Data Source which we made.

Here are some SS from which data source are being tried to used but it's not visible.

The Objective of showing this picture is that where ever Data Source/Odata Is mentioned, The custom Odata which we made are not visible.

@SAPSupport @ranjeetkumar07 @Sap

entry.title: Re: In a multi-app CAP project, how can I trigger navigat...
entry.content:
Sorry might not be a huge amount of help here but gut feel is that the navigation needs to occur client side rather than server side? 

Idea 1

See: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/d782acf8bfd74107ad6a04f0361c5f62

Section: Actions Triggering External Navigation

The flow would be something like:

1. App 1 has a UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation annotation 

2. Upon a user invoking it  App 1 along with the ID navigates to App2

3. App2 invokes your server side action

Idea 2

I wonder if an implementation of a custom action using guided development could do what you needed? 

1. Create Custom Action for the Fiori Elements app

2. In the Handler invoke the action

3. Upon success navigate 

Once again apologies for not being much help, found the question interesting is all

entry.title: Re: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge- April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hello Developers,
The first week's challenge is posted !
It's about working with S/4HANA Cloud OData services which is a very critical topic...

  • Task 1: OData

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Cloud ALM and its functionalities
entry.content: Insightful!

entry.title: SAP Fioriにおけるクリックの制御について
entry.content:
皆様
閲覧いただきありがとうございます。

【背景】
SAP Fioriの画面操作をRPA製品で自動化したいと考えています。その製品はWebページに対してjavascriptを挿入して制御を試みます。

【質問】
SAP Fioriで表示されているボタンやタブをユーザが手動でクリックする操作をjavascriptで実行する方法を教えていただきたいです。
通常のWebページのように以下のように要素に設定されているIDなどのセレクタを元にclick()メソッドを発行しましたが特に反応がない状況です。

試したスクリプト1：
document.getElementById('elementのセレクタ').click();

試したスクリプト2：
event = new CustomEvent('click');
element.dispatchEvent(event);


もしご存じの方がいらっしゃればご教示頂けると大変ありがたいです。
お手数おかけいたしますが宜しくお願い致します。

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content:
Hello, please go to https://www.sap.com/india/account/universal-id.html, follow the video, and within 15 minutes you will get your ID. 

 Please join the Kolkata Group 

----- Stay up-to-date with SAP Community and subscribe to What's New today! -----

entry.title: SAP MDK attachment multi image selection at a time for IOS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are unable to select multiple images at a time while using IOS devices. We have used standard attachment control.

This was working fine in the Android version we are able to select multiple images at a time.

Please let anyone come across this issue and any advise how we can achieve this for IOS devices.

@bill_froelich Please advise ?

Thanks,

Krishna.

Do you have any filters in the Transform?
You have the sample size selected as 50 - can you try increasing it to 5000 and then see?

Regards,
Rahul.

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content: Give link to the page.

entry.title: Re: router Non-xml condition error as Invalid format of c...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

you cannot combine multiple and / or operators in the same expression using parantheses.

I would suggest to use a small groovy script, check the C4C_ContactID and userId there and put the result in a property. After that, use this property in your router condition.

Best regards

Christian

entry.title: SAP CloudALM - Transports for SAP Business Suite
entry.content:
Dear community,

As SAP Solution Manager will be end of life "soon", we're looking at SAP CloudALM to move away from SolMan.

However, while CloudALM has "Cloud Transports" (for CPI and whatnot), I'm wondering if anyone has configured CloudALM for regular vanilla Business Suite (your ERP, Fiori, BW, ...) systems.

Is that even possible or is it a planned feature in the near future? I'm having a hard time finding any information in this regards.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One V10 SQL API
entry.content:
Hi RuanDuPreez,

If you are looking in Service Layer context, I would like to inform you that Service Layer works on MS SQL (Windows) version as well in SAP Business One version 10.0.

Install Service Layer using SAP Business One Component Wizard and try to access the following link: https://SLDSERVER:50000.

It will provide you the list of all the APIs available.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For Inbound Logistics Work Center, delivery type "Customer Return " exists for Inbound Delivery Notifications, Warehouse Requests and Inbound Deliveries Views.  Please view the example under Inbound Delivery Notifications View. There is no single document named Customer Return.

Therefore, could you please let me know which customer return is your referred?

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Support| Logistics Area Support

entry.title: Re: Full update of 0CO_OM_WBS_3 does not work. I get only...
entry.content: Thanks for your help maggie_yi, but note 2880477 is not suitable for our system.

entry.title: ENABLE_SSL in DATABASE
entry.content:
Hi 

We are going to ENABLE_SSL in Database please let us know the impact.

Regards,
SAP BASIS


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ENABLE_SSL in DATABASE
entry.content:
Suggest you go through the documents below:

3243590 - Performance impact with SSL Configuration for HANA system replication
2943303 - How to configure secure communication Between Primary and Secondary Sites without downtime.
3006410 - How to disable secure communication between Primary and Secondary site without downtime  
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/ec50b815f5b740d7a9777d80f7104a2c.html

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
Re: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv report for CL11(display bom level by level)
entry.content: You don't see "Create implementation" because your cursor is on an enhancement instead of an enhancement option (point or section). You must click on the Enhance button or menu, then click on Show Implicit Enhancement Options, and right click on ENHANCEMENT-POINT to see Create implementation (to create an Enhancement).

entry.title: Re: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv re...
entry.content: Please do not post a solution. Instead, click on "show replies" then "comment".

If you have any examples of the second or even the first option that fit this problematic would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Recap — SAP Data Unleashed 2024

entry.title: System error when loading users in SAP SF: Exception caught:com.successfactors.sca.service.exception
entry.content:
Errors: System error when loading users:

00001700 - Exception caught: com.successfactors.sca.service.exception.ServiceCreateFailedException: can not get personId

User was has been hard purged and should be recreated

I am getting this error when I want to create a new user in SAP SF which was hard purged from SAP SF.

I've tried to Open Check Tool and search for "User Management" application: it should find the user IDs which are not properly configured and should be causing the error But there's no error related to user IDs

entry.title: how to use "Redis, Hyperscaler Option" in spring boot
entry.content:
I create a redis-cache on BTP, and i want to use the redis server in my springboot application, but i don't know how to config the redis properties, the redis-cache server's infomation json is:

{
"password": "k7QMdykZgwusYqbhAKHqP9TDDKSqQ4w40AzCaHEtIEs=",
"hostname": "redis-c32593a9-54bb-4a9c-a25c-74bcf84021b2.redis.cache.windows.net",
"port": 6380,
"uri": "rediss://:k7QMdykZgwusYqbhAKHqP9TDDKSqQ4w40AzCaHEtIEs=@redis-c32593a9-54bb-4a9c-a25c-74bcf84021b2.redis.cache.windows.net:6380",
"cluster_mode": false,
"tls": {
"host": "redis-c32593a9-54bb-4a9c-a25c-74bcf84021b2.redis.cache.windows.net",
"port": 6380,
"ca": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- MIIDjjCCAnagAwIBAgIQAzrx5qcRqaC7KGSxHQn65TANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQsFADBh MQswCQYDVQQGEwJVUzEVMBMGA1UEChMMRGlnaUNlcnQgSW5jMRkwFwYDVQQLExB3 d3cuZGlnaWNlcnQuY29tMSAwHgYDVQQDExdEaWdpQ2VydCBHbG9iYWwgUm9vdCBH MjAeFw0xMzA4MDExMjAwMDBaFw0zODAxMTUxMjAwMDBaMGExCzAJBgNVBAYTAlVT MRUwEwYDVQQKEwxEaWdpQ2VydCBJbmMxGTAXBgNVBAsTEHd3dy5kaWdpY2VydC5j b20xIDAeBgNVBAMTF0RpZ2lDZXJ0IEdsb2JhbCBSb290IEcyMIIBIjANBgkqhkiG 9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAuzfNNNx7a8myaJCtSnX/RrohCgiN9RlUyfuI 2/Ou8jqJkTx65qsGGmvPrC3oXgkkRLpimn7Wo6h+4FR1IAWsULecYxpsMNzaHxmx 1x7e/dfgy5SDN67sH0NO3Xss0r0upS/kqbitOtSZpLYl6ZtrAGCSYP9PIUkY92eQ q2EGnI/yuum06ZIya7XzV+hdG82MHauVBJVJ8zUtluNJbd134/tJS7SsVQepj5Wz tCO7TG1F8PapspUwtP1MVYwnSlcUfIKdzXOS0xZKBgyMUNGPHgm+F6HmIcr9g+UQ vIOlCsRnKPZzFBQ9RnbDhxSJITRNrw9FDKZJobq7nMWxM4MphQIDAQABo0IwQDAP BgNVHRMBAf8EBTADAQH/MA4GA1UdDwEB/wQEAwIBhjAdBgNVHQ4EFgQUTiJUIBiV 5uNu5g/6+rkS7QYXjzkwDQYJKoZIhvcNAQELBQADggEBAGBnKJRvDkhj6zHd6mcY 1Yl9PMWLSn/pvtsrF9+wX3N3KjITOYFnQoQj8kVnNeyIv/iPsGEMNKSuIEyExtv4 NeF22d+mQrvHRAiGfzZ0JFrabA0UWTW98kndth/Jsw1HKj2ZL7tcu7XUIOGZX1NG Fdtom/DzMNU+MeKNhJ7jitralj41E6Vf8PlwUHBHQRFXGU7Aj64GxJUTFy8bJZ91 8rGOmaFvE7FBcf6IKshPECBV1/MUReXgRPTqh5Uykw7+U0b6LJ3/iyK5S9kJRaTe pLiaWN0bfVKfjllDiIGknibVb63dDcY3fe0Dkhvld1927jyNxF1WW6LZZm6zNTfl MrY= -----END CERTIFICATE----- "
}
}

and please help us how to config the redis connection in my springboot application.

entry.title: Re: Converted our system SAP to SAP S4HANA we are facing issue to print any SMARTFORM.
entry.content: we have the same issue, but we have version 7.7 level 16, doesn't work though, according to the sap note 3260025, it should work from patch level 11 on in version 7.70

entry.title: Re: Downloading multiple files as a single zip folder in SAP UI5 Application
entry.content:
you need to declare and initialize the zipContent array before using it.

var zipContent = [];

entry.title: Analytic privilige issue in Embedded SAC
entry.content:
We are using Live connection configuration based on HANA Analytics Adapter between Embedded SAC & our BTP (HANA Cloud DB). Connection is working fine and it is able to bring the data from source to target which is E-SAC in this case.

We want to enable row level authorization or Dynamic authorization based on user login in the reporting layer where we are using Analytic privileges in HANA calculation view with Dynamic restrictions based on Procedure.

Analytic Privilege is working fine as is expected to be however in E-SAC we found that reports are running based on DB runtime user rather than currently logged user. Eg: If I login in SAC then SAC should recognise my user ID which is Subash in this case however it is getting data based on runtime user or session user.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Can Modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Pu...
entry.content:
I'm not a topic expert but I guess the keywords you are looking for could be 'extensibility' or 'key user extensibility'.

Here you can find a comprehensive guide about all kinds of extensibility: https://www.sap.com/documents/2022/10/52e0cd9b-497e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

If you search for 'extensibility' / 'key user extensibility' you can probably also find blogs, videos, tutorials, etc. which are less comprehensive but easier to consume compare to the large guide that I linked.

entry.title: Re: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template...
entry.content:
Hello,

I think the issue is that there is a lot of confusion about how to interpret the assessment report. 

The assessment category and effort reflect if the scenario can be migrated to Integration Suite regardless if you use a tool or do it manually. 

We are aware that we suppose very often the default template, we addressed this with a more generic approach which is about to be released by mid of this year. The default template should be history once this is launched. 

kind regards

entry.title: Re: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template...
entry.content:
Hi Richi,

Looking forward to the new version. Is there some kind of roadmap available on the Migration Assessment tool? (when will what scenario's be supported)

Regards

Ron

entry.title: EC Business rule for custom field picklist
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule or an association in order to obtain the needed picklist values. We have a custom field in the Comp info portlet: "Pay Change Reason" which currently contains picklist values from all the countries, but the idea would be to have in that field only values based on the Country/Legal Entity of the employee. 

Any recommendation would be appreciated.

Thank you and best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Re: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is not registering DI API properly (SAP B1 v10 2

Alfredo

entry.title: Re: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is no...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

In SAP Business One version 10.0, almost each and every component is 64-bit only.

Why there is a need for 32-Bit DI API?

Still, if you need it, you need to register the 32-Bit DI API manually.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori (APP Server)のvCPU数増強について

Best regards, Gergana

entry.title: Re: System log in SLT
entry.content:
Hi Siba,

You can confirm the timestamp from where you see the error. Then run SM21, filter with proper condition and find the same timestamp there. When you confirmed the relevant entry from SM21, you can also double click it to check the details.

Sometimes, the "job cancelled" error may not mean an error. If you deactivate a configuration, all the running Data Transfer Jobs will be cancelled, and you will see same message.

Thanks,

Li

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi everyone! 

A long-awaited update: Effective today, SAP Java Buildpack 2 now supports Java 21. See release notes.

entry.title: Re: System log in SLT
entry.content: tx SM21

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Current status of challenge, Task 0:

entry.title: How to create RAP Action to generate a file to download?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP Environment, I have a RAP entity with an action. Let's call the action 'generateFile'. In that action, I have specific logic that uses the XCO classes to build out an XLSX file. The RAP entity and its action are projected and exposed into a Fiori Elements application. The action is triggered from a user pressing a button.

The final step is that the XLSX file that is generated needs to be automatically downloaded to the user's frontend. Is there a way of doing that from the action itself? Or do I need to handle this from the Fiori app (meaning, no way to test the action from the OData service preview)?

entry.title: Re: New pricing condition update for sales order
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: CAP with Fiori Elements: Actions on List Report / Object Page using Annotations – Part2
entry.content:
Thank you for this blog, really useful! 

I was wondering if you could trigger a custom action in one app that creates an object and after it is succesfully taken place, do navigation to an external app that displays the newly created object.

entry.title: Re: New pricing condition update for sales order
entry.content: Hello , are there any bapi for this function ?

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. When I say "Customer Return" I am referring to the voucher that can be found in the workcenter below. Sales Order > Return When you receive a return of goods from a customer, you create and release the slips in the following order, right? 1.Customer Return Notification 2.Inbound Delivery 3.Return I am now looking for a Data Source that can share 3 and 1 or 3 and 2 above. If that DataSource is available, I will use the Return ID to get the Inbound Delivery information (ActualDelivery Date, Doc Type). Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

entry.title: Re: FireFighter ID login issue - FFID Status is in Red
entry.content:
Hello,

What is your GRCFND_A SP level? Have you updated this component lately?
Since SP21 there was a big change in the way how whole FF solution works and since then SAP released a bunch of notes.

I believe that I came across exactly the same problem at some point when investigating and fixing this SP21.

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. When I say "Customer Return" I am referring to the voucher that can be found in the workcenter below. Sales Order > Return When you receive a return of goods from a customer, you create and release the slips in the following order, right? 1.Customer Return Notification 2.Inbound Delivery 3.Return I am now looking for a Data Source that can share 3 and 1 or 3 and 2 above. If that DataSource is available, I will use the Return ID to get the Inbound Delivery information (ActualDelivery Date, Doc Type).

entry.title: Re: router.GetRoute("xxx").attachMatched not picking up s...
entry.content:
If you set the property greedy on the route, matching event will fire for it even if another route has already been matched. By default it is false and so only the first matching route will fire. This is shown in the sample / Routing / Route / Route Patterns.  Here greedy is set to true. 

See: greedy in properties for Route Settings

You mention subroutes in the title. There was a concept of subroutes till v 1.28, it is now deprecated and replaced by nested routes.  See parent in  properties for Route Settings. Perhaps this is what you want.

entry.title: Re: SLT Central finance data replication using RFC commut...
entry.content:
SLT generates 3 function module for replication process.
OLI module - remote FM that is created on source system
OLC module - situated in central control system
OLO module - remote FM is created on target system.
The replication process run OLC module, that first remotely call OLI to read the data from source, then remotely call OLO module and transfer data there. OLO module calls the cFIN function module, that post incoming data into corresponding tables

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
hi @martinlitalin 

any tentative date for the Malaysia webinar?

or where can I check on the updates for the webinar?

thank you!

entry.title: Strategic Expansion: K.Hartwall Acquires Retailquip to Fortify APAC Presence
entry.content:
Dear Editor,

I trust this message finds you well. I'm reaching out to share a pivotal development from K.Hartwall, a Finnish family-owned leader in intralogistics solutions, that underscores our commitment to growth and innovation in the logistics sector, particularly in the APAC region.

On April 3, 2024, K.Hartwall officially announced its acquisition of the Australian company Retailquip. This strategic move not only marks a significant milestone in the company’s global expansion efforts but also strengthens K.Hartwall’s footprint in Australia and the broader APAC region.

 

Highlights of the Acquisition:

Long-standing Collaboration:The partnership between K.Hartwall and Retailquip dates back over two decades, beginning with the introduction of Compactainers to Coles-Myer in 2005. This acquisition is a natural progression of our synergistic relationship.

Strategic Growth: The acquisition is aligned with K.Hartwall's strategic growth plan, aiming to enhance our market position and offer more adaptive solutions to our customers, including innovative rental business models.

Focus on Automation: Retailquip will serve as a pivotal hub for K.Hartwall in the APAC region, particularly for developing our stronghold in automation, responding to the growing demand for efficient logistics solutions.

Continued Leadership: Clare Hart-Davies, Managing Director of Retailquip, along with her team, will remain at the helm, ensuring continuity and reliability for customers and building on Retailquip’s success in the Australian market.

The partnership between K.Hartwall and Retailquip is rooted in a shared commitment to sustainability, quality, efficiency, and exceptional customer service. This collaboration aims to introduce Nordic innovation to the Australian supply chain sector, promising to enhance local support while positioning itself as a major player in the APAC region. The synergy of these two companies highlights a forward-looking approach to logistics, emphasizing the importance of sustainable practices and innovative solutions in shaping the future of the industry

For more details on this exciting development and what it means for the future of logistics and supply chain management in Australia and the APAC region, please find the complete press release attached. You can also find high resolution images on our newsroom through the link below. All content is freely available to you to publish as you wish.

https://ins-news.com/en/100/954/3158/Finnish-KHartwall-and-their-Australian-distribution-partner-Retailquip-join-forces.htmhttp://www.ins-news.com/

Thank you for your time in considering this article. If you have any questions about the product, comments, or feedback on the content, or decide to cover the news, I would be delighted to hear from you.

Kind Regards,

Sam Johnsson

entry.title: Re: SAP SLT replication with RFC
entry.content:
You cannot  replicate data into HANA DB (on DB level) if you don't create secondary DB connection. But connection could managed by SLT (in this case connection will be created by SLT and deleted also by SLT when configuration is deleted) or not managed by SLT (when you created own connection).

Alternative, if you have ABAP stack over the target HANA DB you can use scenario RFC - RFC. But in such case replication is possible only into ABAP schema.

entry.title: Re: RFC Communication failure-recurring data services job
entry.content:
Hi @siba_pkd21 - is this on a Version previous to DS 4.2 SP14 Patch 4? Have you checked the following Note:

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002989910

It recommends on upgrading to PL 4 of SP14

entry.title: Re: JWT With RSA256 Encryption ABAP Stack
entry.content:
Hello FI3,

Could you please check this code?

 

 

PRIVATE SECTION.
    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_jwt_header,
        alg TYPE string,
        typ TYPE string,
      END OF ty_jwt_header .

    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_jwt_payload,
        secret TYPE string, " private key
        iat    TYPE i, "Issued At
        exp    TYPE i, "Expiration Time
      END OF ty_jwt_payload .
METHOD generate_jwttoken.
    TRY.
        DATA(ls_header) = VALUE ty_jwt_header( alg = me->t_params[ name = c_alg ]-value  "HS256
                                               typ = me->t_params[ name = c_typ ]-value ).  "JWT

        DATA(lv_json_header) = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data        = ls_header
                                                        compress    = abap_on
                                                        pretty_name = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-low_case ).
        DATA(lv_b64_header) = cl_http_utility=>if_http_utility~encode_base64( lv_json_header ).

        DATA(lv_currentts) = zcl_bc_util=>generate_timestamp( iv_tzone = 'TURKEY' ).
        DATA(lv_plus5min)  = lv_currentts + 300.
        DATA(ls_payload)   = VALUE ty_jwt_payload( secret = me->t_params[ name = c_private ]-value
                                                   iat    = lv_currentts
                                                   exp    = lv_plus5min ).

        DATA(lv_json_payload) = /ui2/cl_json=>serialize( data        = ls_payload
                                                         compress    = abap_on
                                                         pretty_name = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-low_case ).
        DATA(lv_b64_payload) = cl_http_utility=>if_http_utility~encode_base64( lv_json_payload ).
        DATA(lv_xpublic)     = zcl_bc_util=>conv_string_to_xstring( CONV string( me->t_params[ name = c_public ]-value ) ).
        DATA(lv_data)        = lv_b64_header && '.' && lv_b64_payload.

        cl_abap_hmac=>calculate_hmac_for_char( EXPORTING if_algorithm     = CONV string( me->t_params[ name = c_algorithm ]-value )  "SHA256
                                                         if_key           = lv_xpublic
                                                         if_data          = lv_data
                                               IMPORTING ef_hmacb64string = DATA(lv_b64_hmac) ).

        DATA(lv_off) = strlen( lv_b64_hmac ) - 1.
        lv_b64_hmac  = lv_b64_hmac(lv_off).

        REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF: '/' IN lv_b64_hmac WITH '_',
                                    '+' IN lv_b64_hmac WITH '-'.

        me->v_token  = lv_data && '.' && lv_b64_hmac.

      CATCH cx_abap_message_digest INTO DATA(lx_hmac). " Exception Class for Message Digest
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_kw
          EXPORTING
            textid = lx_hmac->if_t100_message~t100key.

*      CATCH zcx_bc_util INTO DATA(lx_bc). " 
*        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_kw
*          EXPORTING
*            textid = lx_bc->if_t100_message~t100key.

    ENDTRY.
ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

 

 

METHOD generate_timestamp.
*   IMPORTING !iv_tzone      TYPE tznzone DEFAULT 'UTC'
*   RETURNING VALUE(rv_secs) TYPE tzntstmpl
*   RAISING   zcx_bc_util.

    DATA ts1 TYPE c LENGTH 20.

    GET TIME STAMP FIELD DATA(ts).
    CONVERT TIME STAMP ts TIME ZONE iv_tzone INTO DATE DATA(dt) TIME DATA(tm).
    ts1 = dt && tm.

    DATA(ts2) = CONV tzntstmpl( '19700101000000' ).

    TRY.
        " Time Interval in Seconds
        rv_secs = CONV int4( cl_abap_tstmp=>subtract( EXPORTING tstmp1 = CONV tzntstmpl( ts1 )
                                                                tstmp2 = ts2 ) ).

      CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_range INTO DATA(lx_range). " Parameter with invalid value range
        "DATA(ls_t100) = set_message_from_obj( lx_range ).

      CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_type INTO DATA(lx_type).  " Parameter with Invalid Type
        "ls_t100 = set_message_from_obj( lx_type ).

    ENDTRY.

    CHECK ls_t100 IS NOT INITIAL.
*    RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_bc_util
*      EXPORTING
*        textid = ls_t100.

ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

 

METHOD conv_string_to_xstring.
    DATA: ls_t100 TYPE scx_t100key.

    CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
      EXPORTING
        text     = iv_str
        mimetype = 'charset=utf-8'
        encoding = '4110'
      IMPORTING
        buffer   = rv_xstr
      EXCEPTIONS
        failed   = 1
        OTHERS   = 2.

    CHECK sy-subrc <> 0.

*    ls_t100 = set_messagge_from_sy( ).

*    RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE zcx_bc_util
*      EXPORTING
*        textid = ls_t100.

ENDMETHOD.

 

 

Good luck.

Caner.

entry.title: Does SAP C4C Mobile app support SAP Fiori SDK for launching Fiori app using mashups in offline mode?
entry.content:
I'm currently exploring the capabilities of the SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C) Mobile app and its integration with SAP Fiori SDKs. Specifically, I'm interested in understanding whether the SAP C4C Mobile app supports the utilization of SAP Fiori Software Development Kits (SDKs) to launch Fiori applications while offline, particularly using mashups.

Could anyone with experience in this area provide insights or guidance? I'd appreciate any information on how feasible it is to leverage SAP Fiori SDKs for offline Fiori app launches with mashups within the SAP C4C Mobile app environment.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: CBC 2SL customer using CLT service
entry.content:
Hi Jin,

this should be answered by the SAP CBC colleagues. I added the according tag.

@CBC: Can you answer this one?

Best regards,

Nils Buerckel

entry.title: How to use Fiori-Launchpad and integrated 3rd-Party Website behind a Reverse-Proxy (nginx) to avoid
entry.content:
Hello Community,
We have developed a UI5-Control that integrates an external Web-Page of a 3rd-Party Application to a UI5-App. The resulting UI5-App is configured to be used in a Fiori-Launchpad of an S/4 onPremise (2020).
Problem is, that this sap-system and the 3rd-Party Web-Page running in our Control (using IFrames) have different domains. So we have a Cross-Domain Issue.
One solution could be, to allow the domain of the S/4-System in the 3rd-Party WebSite to IFrame it, using the "Access-Control-Allow-Orign" Headers. 
But in our case this is not sufficent due to we need access to an api of 3rd-Party WebSite to control its behaviour. But this api is only available as an object inside the WebPage. And this is also not allowed in CORS-Policy.

Our proposed solution is to use a reverse-proxy, in this case nginx. Nginx is installed at a seperate server, with its own (sub)-domain and a valid certificate. This reverse proxy shell present one host to the browser client and both domains (one for sap with its fiori-Launchpad and one for the 3rd-Party Website) shell be accessible behind the same url, only destinguished by the first path behind the reverse-proxies url.

Here a picture of the proposed architecture.

But here the trouble begins. We are currently not even able to create a functioning configuration for the sap-system to work properly.
Actually we use this as a rule for nginx for reverse-proxying to s4h. But this returns a Website from SAP with only a "error-tag":

 

 

server {
    listen                          443 http2 ssl;
    server_name                     www.xyz.com;

    large_client_header_buffers 4 16k;
    
    ## SSL Config xx
    
    underscores_in_headers on;
    location / {
        proxy_pass https://s4h.xyz-sap.com:443;
        client_max_body_size 100M;      
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Host $host:$server_port;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Server $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Port   443;

        
        # Go to next proxy upstream if first server is down.
        proxy_next_upstream error timeout http_500 http_502 http_503 http_504;
        proxy_connect_timeout 1200s;
        proxy_send_timeout 1200s;

        #proxy_hide_header location;
        proxy_buffer_size          1280k;
        proxy_buffers              4 2560k;
        proxy_busy_buffers_size    2560k;
    }

    # HSTS (ngx_http_headers_module is required) (15768000 seconds = 6 months)
    add_header Strict-Transport-Security max-age=15768000;

    error_log /var/log/nginx/xyz.com-error.log;
    access_log /var/log/nginx/xyz.com-access.log;
}

 

 


Any idea or help would be great. 

Kind regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content: Dear customer, Thanks for your detailed information, I am checking this and will update you once anything gets found.

entry.title: Re: sap-sd error
entry.content: can you provide the link please

entry.title: Re: S4H with ePP/DS - purchase requisitions are created w...
entry.content:
Hi Walter,

I guess you have not setup an number range in PPDS in /SAPAPO/RRPCUST1.

 

Use Number Ranges

 

Use

  • If you set the indicator, the system creates an order number for an order that is created locally in SAP APO.
  • If you do not set the indicator, the system does not create a visible number for the order. You can process the order in the planning table, but you cannot call it up individually as the individual orders cannot be distinguished from one another due to the lack of the number.

Dependencies

  • The system creates the number on the basis of the number range interval that you have specified in the number range number field.
  • You define the number range in Customizing for Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling under Maintain Number Ranges for Orders.
  • For more information, see Local Orders and Order Numbers in the SAP APO System.

 

Number range number

Identifies a number range interval within an object or subobject.

 

Procedure

Enter any two-character code.

entry.title: Uniting our efforts for advancement of the global infrastructure
entry.content:
Across the globe, we're witnessing a remarkable era of infrastructure transformation. This month, we spotlight notable projects in the US, UK, Europe, China and Australia, illustrating the diversity and scale of efforts to modernize and enhance our world's infrastructure.

United States: The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) is reshaping America’s infrastructure landscape, catalyzing projects across transportation, broadband, and public works. One key initiative is the Gateway Program between New York and New Jersey, set to significantly improve rail connectivity. 

United Kingdom: High Speed 2 (HS2) exemplifies the UK's ambition, aiming to revolutionize travel times and connectivity across the country. This project underscores a nationwide commitment to advanced infrastructure development. 

Europe: The Brenner Base Tunnel, bridging Austria and Italy, stands as a testament to Europe's dedication to sustainable and efficient transportation. This tunnel is a pivotal piece in the continent's infrastructure puzzle, enhancing the flow of goods and people across borders.

China: The Belt and Road Initiative (BRI), China's ambitious global infrastructure development strategy, continues to unfold, with significant investments across continents.  

Australia: The Melbourne Metro Tunnel project highlights Australia's focus on enhancing urban mobility and connectivity. This ambitious project is a cornerstone of Australia's infrastructure modernization efforts.

 

How SAP Can Help the World Run Better in Projects and Asset Lifecycle

In this dynamic landscape of global infrastructure projects, managing the end-to-end lifecycle of such endeavors presents a formidable challenge. SAP’s suite of solutions emerges as an essential ally, equipped with AI-driven analytics and predictive maintenance capabilities to optimize asset management and enhance performance.

AI and Railways: Taking asset performance to new heights 

 

SAP's software systems are adept at navigating the complexities inherent in large-scale projects, from inception through completion and ongoing maintenance. By leveraging SAP's robust capabilities, infrastructure projects worldwide can achieve greater efficiency, reliability, and sustainability.

Digital Transformation of Public Infrastructure in Aotearoa, New Zealand

 

Our commitment to improving project and asset lifecycle management with SAP's innovative solutions is not merely about adopting advanced technology; it's about fostering smarter, more connected, and sustainable development. As we continue to embrace monumental infrastructure projects, SAP stands ready to support these initiatives, ensuring they not only meet their goals but also contribute to a resilient and efficient global infrastructure ecosystem. 

The Executive’s Guide to IIJA Funding for Technology

entry.title: Re: how to use "Redis, Hyperscaler Option" in spring boot
entry.content:
For how to access from local machine see Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli | SAP Help Portal

I suppose you could take the approach described in Binding to Data Services with Spring Boot in Cloud Foundry. The credentials are available in VCAP_SERVICES.

entry.title: Re: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

approach #2 is best practice and supported by several concepts.

1. See discovery center mission "Accelerate Financial Planning and Analysis": https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/3945/4146/?tab=overview

2. See how to integrate S/4HANA Cloud with SAC Planning, based on scope item 1YB: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/1cbcff7ccd35405ab445b223c1ab1588/2f610a5f08cb4142ac188c3e6a127b4e.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards
Christoph

entry.title: Re: BAdIs for MRP
entry.content:
Hello ALL,

First of all thanks for your blogs @Caetano they provides more information about  flexibility of MRP.

Recently we have a requirement for considering the customer consignment stock as available stock in MRP planning .

I know that the special stock is not considered in MRP assuming that it is a existing element therefore tried to use BADI-MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA method CONSIDER_CUSTCONSIGNMENT to Influence that MRP considers the CCS as available stock i have done below changes.

  METHOD if_ex_md_change_mrp_data~consider_custconsignment.
    ch_no_exit = abap_true.
    ch_changed = abap_true.
  ENDMETHOD.   

While running the MD02 and MD04 the BADI itself it is not triggering, i don't what mistake i have done here .

I also tried with BADI -  MD_ADD_ELEMENTS method ADD_CHANGE_ELEMENTS the with changing parameters CH_COPY_MDPSX,CH_CHANGED to X in this case the Badi got triggered but no value changed in MD04 .

Notes referred - 2012620,301681,

Can someone throw some light on this topic it would be really helpful, thanks 

Br,

Charan

entry.title: Re: Implement a More Efficient GIS-ERP Integration Following a Few Simple Steps
entry.content: Nice document
